title: ParameterScheduleApplyType
content:
# ParameterScheduleApplyType

Type of the schedule action to apply. `schedule` applies the new parameters, `schedule-revert` reverts to the original parameters.

## Enum Values

- `schedule`
- `schedule-revert`
summary: Type of the schedule action to apply. `schedule` applies the new parameters, `schedule-revert` reverts to the original parameters.
